title: Switch from Hebrew to English and keep layout direction correct
description: This verifies that a Hebrew visitor can switch the site to English and see the page update to the English LTR experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Click the language selector in the header
Select English
Verify the page language updates to English
Verify the page direction updates to left-to-right

title: Use the moving cost calculator to estimate a move
description: A visitor can adjust the moving cost calculator and see the estimate update immediately for a realistic move scenario.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Increase the room count
Increase the floor number
Enable packing service
Enable unpacking service
Verify the estimated total updates
Verify the updated estimate is announced for assistive technology

title: Moving calculator shows a live estimate as options change
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the moving cost calculator to enter move details and see the estimate update live.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the moving cost calculator section
Fill in a valid moving size or rooms value
Fill in a valid floor value
Select packing and unpacking options
Verify an estimated total is displayed and updates as the calculator inputs change

title: Request a quote through the moving cost calculator
description: This verifies that a visitor can complete the calculator and see the estimate update as options change.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the calculator section
Fill in the moving inputs with valid values
Select packing and unpacking options as needed
Verify a live total is displayed
Verify the estimate breakdown updates to reflect the selected options

title: View the landing page in Hebrew
description: A Hebrew-speaking visitor can open the main landing page and see the Hebrew RTL experience with the core content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Verify the Hebrew landing page is displayed
Verify the page is laid out in right-to-left direction

title: Switching languages updates the landing page correctly
description: This verifies that a visitor can switch between Hebrew, English, and French and see the page language, URL, and reading direction update appropriately.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Verify the landing page is shown in Hebrew with right-to-left reading direction
Click the language switcher option for English
Verify the page is shown in English with left-to-right reading direction and the URL reflects English
Click the language switcher option for French
Verify the page is shown in French with left-to-right reading direction and the URL reflects French

title: Use the site in Hebrew with RTL rendering
description: This verifies that the Hebrew landing page loads as a complete RTL experience for Hebrew-speaking visitors.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Verify the page language is Hebrew
Verify the page direction is right-to-left

title: Navigate the landing page with the keyboard only
description: This verifies that a keyboard-only visitor can move through interactive content and activate a contact action without using a mouse.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Press Tab
Press Tab repeatedly to move through interactive elements
Activate a contact action with the keyboard
Verify a contact action is opened or initiated
Verify keyboard focus remains usable on the page

title: Use only the keyboard to reach navigation and contact
description: A keyboard-only user can skip to the main content, move through the page, and activate a contact option without using the mouse.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Press Tab to move focus to the skip link
Activate the skip link
Press Tab to move through the main page controls
Activate the WhatsApp contact action
Verify focus moves to the main content
Verify a contact action is activated

title: Keyboard users can skip to the main content and reach contact actions
description: This verifies that a keyboard-only visitor can use the skip link, move through the landing page, and activate a contact action without using a mouse.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Press Tab to focus the skip-to-content control
Activate the skip-to-content control
Verify focus moves to the main content area
Press Tab until a contact action is focused
Activate the focused contact action
Verify a WhatsApp or phone contact action is initiated

title: Reach WhatsApp or call from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can quickly contact the company using the prominent phone or WhatsApp actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Activate the WhatsApp or phone contact action from the hero area
Verify a contact action is initiated
Verify the contact option is available from the landing page

title: Switch from Hebrew to English
description: A visitor can switch the site language from Hebrew to English and see the English LTR page with the URL updated accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Click the English language switcher
Verify the English landing page is displayed
Verify the page is laid out in left-to-right direction

title: Mobile navigation opens and closes on small screens
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, use it to navigate, and close it again on a small viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Set the viewport to a mobile width
Open the mobile navigation menu
Verify the mobile navigation overlay is displayed
Select a navigation item for a main section
Verify the page scrolls to the selected section and the mobile menu is closed

title: Jump to the main content from the skip link
description: This verifies that keyboard users can bypass the header and move directly to the main content area.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Press Tab
Press Enter
Verify the main content area is reached
Verify the skip link is no longer the active focus target

title: Open the mobile navigation and jump to a section
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu and navigate to a page section from the overlay.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Open the hamburger menu
Click a navigation link to a section
Verify the menu closes after navigation
Verify the selected section is visible

title: Open the mobile navigation menu
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu and access the full-screen navigation overlay on a small viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Click the hamburger button
Verify the mobile navigation overlay is displayed
Verify the menu is marked as expanded

title: WhatsApp contact action is available from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the WhatsApp contact button from the landing page to start a chat action.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Click the floating WhatsApp contact button
Verify a WhatsApp contact action is initiated

title: Request a quote from the calculator via WhatsApp
description: A visitor can move from the calculator to the WhatsApp contact action to request an exact quote.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Update the calculator estimate
Click the WhatsApp contact action
Verify the WhatsApp contact action opens
Verify the hardcoded contact destination is used

title: Call now contact action is available from the hero section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the hero call button to initiate a phone call from the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Click the hero call action
Verify a phone call action is initiated

title: Adjust moving options and see the estimate update
description: This verifies that changing rooms, floor, and packing options updates the moving estimate without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the calculator section
Fill in the moving inputs with valid values
Change one or more calculator options
Verify the estimate changes after the inputs are updated
Verify the updated breakdown remains visible

title: Switch from English to French
description: A visitor can switch the site language from English to French and see the French LTR page with the URL updated accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the French language switcher
Verify the French landing page is displayed
Verify the page is laid out in left-to-right direction

title: Contact actions remain available in the contact section
description: This verifies that a visitor can reach the contact section and use the available contact actions there.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the contact section
Click the WhatsApp contact action in the contact section
Verify a WhatsApp contact action is initiated

title: Navigate to a section from the mobile menu
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, choose a section link, and land on the target section with the menu closed.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Click the hamburger button
Click the Services navigation link
Verify the Services section is visible
Verify the mobile navigation overlay is closed

title: Calculator options change the price breakdown
description: This verifies that a visitor can combine stepper and checkbox options in the calculator and see the price breakdown reflect the selected services.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the moving cost calculator section
Set a smaller room count
Increase the room count using the stepper controls
Enable a packing option
Enable an unpacking option
Verify the price breakdown reflects the selected room and service options

title: Keep the room count at the minimum
description: A visitor cannot decrease the room count below the minimum value and the estimate remains valid.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Set the room count to the minimum value
Attempt to decrease the room count
Verify the room count remains at the minimum value
Verify the estimate remains valid

title: Open a legal page from the footer and return to the site
description: This verifies that visitors can reach a legal page and use the provided back-to-site navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Scroll to the footer
Open the privacy page from the footer legal links
Verify the legal page content is displayed
Click the link back to the main site
Verify the landing page is displayed again

title: Open the accessibility statement from the footer
description: A visitor can reach the accessibility statement from the landing page footer and view the page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the accessibility statement link
Verify the accessibility statement content is displayed

title: Update the estimate when packing options change
description: A visitor can toggle packing-related options and see the price breakdown recalculate in real time.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Enable packing service
Enable unpacking service
Disable packing service
Verify the price breakdown updates
Verify the total estimate changes with the selected options

title: Accessibility statement page loads with contact options
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the accessibility statement page, read the content, and find the contact options provided there.

steps.description: Navigate to /accessibility
Verify the accessibility statement page is displayed with compliance information
Verify contact options are available on the page

title: Reach the footer legal links from mobile
description: A mobile visitor can scroll through the landing page and open the legal and accessibility pages from the footer.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Scroll to the footer
Click the accessibility link
Verify the accessibility statement page is displayed
Navigate back to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the privacy link
Verify the privacy policy page is displayed

title: Privacy page provides a way back to the main site
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the privacy policy and return to the landing page using the provided navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /privacy
Verify the privacy policy page is displayed
Click the back-to-site link
Verify the landing page is displayed

title: Return to the main site from a legal page
description: A visitor can move from a legal page back to the main landing page using the provided link.

steps.description: Navigate to /privacy
Click the link to return to the main site
Verify the landing page is displayed

title: Keep the floor count from going below zero
description: A visitor cannot reduce the floor number below zero and the calculator continues to show a valid estimate.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Set the floor number to zero
Attempt to decrease the floor number
Verify the floor number remains at zero
Verify no negative floor charge is shown

title: Accessibility page skip link jumps to the main content
description: This verifies that a keyboard user can use the skip link on the accessibility page to move directly to the main content.

steps.description: Navigate to /accessibility
Press Tab to focus the skip-to-content control
Activate the skip-to-content control
Verify focus moves to the main content area on the accessibility page

title: Review the accessibility statement page
description: A visitor can open the accessibility statement directly and read the page content before returning to the main site.

steps.description: Navigate to /accessibility
Verify the accessibility statement page is displayed
Click the link back to the main landing page
Verify the Hebrew landing page is displayed

title: Open the privacy policy from the footer
description: A visitor can reach the privacy policy from the landing page footer and view the page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the privacy policy link
Verify the privacy policy content is displayed

title: Open the privacy policy page from the site
description: A visitor can open a legal page from the footer and see that it loads as a standalone policy page.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the privacy link
Verify the privacy policy page is displayed
Verify the policy content is visible

title: Open the terms of use from the footer
description: A visitor can reach the terms of use from the landing page footer and view the page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the terms of use link
Verify the terms of use content is displayed

title: Legal pages cross-link to each other
description: This verifies that a visitor can move between the terms and cookie policy pages using the provided cross-links.

steps.description: Navigate to /terms
Click the footer link to the cookie policy page
Verify the cookie policy page is displayed
Click the link back to the terms page
Verify the terms of use page is displayed

title: Open the cookie policy from the footer
description: A visitor can reach the cookie policy from the landing page footer and view the page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /he
Scroll to the footer
Click the cookie policy link
Verify the cookie policy content is displayed

title: Keep the current language when an unsupported language is selected
description: This verifies that selecting an unsupported language does not break the current page language or layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Click the language selector in the header
Select an unsupported language option if shown
Verify the page remains in English
Verify the page direction remains left-to-right
